query: Axel Merckx Gran Fondo gran fondo cycling Penticton

videos.title: Penticton's Granfondo Axel Merckx
videos.description: A major cycling race took off this morning from downtown Penticton with riders of all calibre participating.
videos.transcript:
[Music]
wow I'm here on lak Shore Drive in maid
Street in downtown pton where the grand
Fondo took off this morning at 7:
a.m. 15-year-old tataa Westby was the
first Rider in in the 55 km Cordo Fondo
and he won by significant amount he's
thankful he has no
injuries last year I had a pretty bad
crash so it's a bit of a relief to be
able to get to the end without losing
skin and damaging my
bike the race has three different
distances that Riders can choose from
with the 160 km being the main event it
goes All Along The Vineyards with
spectacular views all while reaching
1600 M elevation gain it went pretty
good it was pretty fun I'm
waiting for my mom to come here hoping
she didn't have a crash with riders I'll
finish the race you can bet you'll find
them sitting on patios enjoying a cold
one this afternoon for castet news I'm
Shantel Deacon in
Penticton get cast anet's mobile app
available now on iTunes and Google Play

videos.title: Ride 181 - 10th Annual Okanagan Gran Fondo (2022)
videos.description:
This is the 10th annual Okanagan Granfondo that took place on Sunday, July 10, 2022. Starting in Penticton, B.C., the 3,000 participants rode the 153 km course north along the westside of Okanagan Lake to Summerland for the KOM climb before returning back to Penticton and then south along the eastside of Skaha Lake to Okanagan Falls. From there, riders headed south through Oliver, past the Burrowing Owl vineyard on the northside of Osoyoos before joining Highway 97 for the ride back north to Penticton. 

If interested, please support me in the Tour de Cure to benefit the BC Cancer Foundation  https://tourdecure.ca/participant/2884131/4014

At Fairview Gold Course, we headed west into the hills to ride through the White Lake Grasslands Protected Area. It is an absolutely spectacular cycling area and I loved it. After that, we rejoined Hwy 97 for the final descent into Penticton.

The ride started at 6:30 am with a beautiful cool temperature. The sun eventually took over and temperatures got up to the mid to high 20's.

videos.title: PGAMO Video Teaser
videos.description: http://www.granfondoaxelmerckx.com - Join us on Sunday, July 12th, 2020, for the 10th Prospera Granfondo Axel Merckx Okanagan (PGAMO) in Penticton, British Columbia, Canada.
